author: brian_chesky
example_posts: What I've learned building Airbnb for 15 years: culture is not what you say, it's what you do when no one is watching. Every detail matters.
Today we announced our biggest product launch ever. But what I'm most proud of is the team that built it. Design is not just how it looks, it's how it works.
A story about our early days: we were rejected by 7 investors in one day. What kept us going? Believing in something bigger than ourselves.
